stage_name: 整合性レビュー指摘対応

applied_findings.description: Updated info tab row: changed overflow from 'なし' to 'overflow-y-auto', updated expected behavior to note it has its own scroll container
Updated terminal tab row: changed overflow from 'overflow-y-auto' to 'overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden' for completeness

Updated history tab row: changed component description to reflect wrapper div with sub-tab switcher (Message/Git) and conditional HistoryPane/GitPane rendering, noted overflow-y-auto is on each sub-component

summary: All 3 should-fix items from Stage 2 consistency review have been applied to the design policy document. The impact analysis table in Section 6 now accurately reflects the actual overflow properties and component structure for the info, terminal, and history tabs. A review finding summary section (Section 12) was added to the design policy for traceability.
